name: joaoalvess-skills
description: Personal automation and workflow skills for Codex, including Alexa smart-home control, Spotify playback control, and Git/GitHub publish workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Control Alexa and Spotify, and automate Git publish workflows from Codex
interface.longDescription: Use Joaoalvess Skills to control Amazon Alexa devices, smart-home routines, and Spotify playback from Codex, and to automate Git and GitHub publish flows with grouped conventional commits, non-codex branch naming, and ready pull requests.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Joaoalvess Skills to control Alexa or Spotify, or publish Git changes with commit-push or commit-push-pr.
